svg.title: Altogether Agile horizontal lockup - tight
svg.desc: Horizontal lockup with the Deep Teal hanko mark on the left and the tight wordmark ALTOGETHERAGILE running as one word on the right. Used in navigation bars where vertical space is constrained.

text.font-family: 'Hiragino Sans', 'Yu Gothic', 'Noto Sans CJK JP', sans-serif
